title: Thigh Highs On Golems
description: A 1.20 texture pack that adds thigh highs to the golem!
body:
This is a simple venilla texture pack that adds pink and white thigh highs to golems, and blush.

it was made for [1.20] so i havent tested on other versions yet. it may work on 1.21 and alike, but im not positive.

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
